svg.title: ETH deposit flow from L1 to L2 on Arbitrum
svg.desc: A user calls depositEth() on the L1 Inbox contract, which enqueues a delayed message to the Bridge contract; funds are escrowed on L1 and, after the transaction is justified on Ethereum, Arbitrum nodes pick it up from the Bridge's events and credit the equivalent funds to the user on L2.

text.tspan: and add it to a block
